name = input("What is your name? ")

list.title: Calculator
list.code:
# Scratch: same as the "+ operator" block
a = int(input("First number: "))
b = int(input("Second number: "))
print("Addition: " + str(a + b))
print("Subtraction: " + str(a - b))
print("Multiplication: " + str(a * b))

list.title: If...then
Different greetings
Repeat
Countdown
list.code:
# Scratch: same as the "change by" + "repeat until" blocks
number = 10
while number > 0:
    print(number)
    number = number - 1
print("Blast off! \U0001f680")

list.title: Which one?
list.code:
# Scratch: same as the "item of list" block
fruits = ["apple", "orange", "grape", "strawberry", "peach"]
print("Fruit list: " + str(fruits))
number = int(input("Which one to see? (1-5): "))
print(str(number) + "th is " + fruits[number - 1] + "!")

list.title: Count letters
list.code:
# Scratch: same as the "length of" block
word = input("Type your favorite word: ")
print("\"" + word + "\" has " + str(len(word)) + " letters!")
for letter in word:
    print("-> " + letter)

list.title: Fortune teller
list.code:
# Scratch: same as the "pick random" block
import random
result = random.choice(["Super lucky!", "Pretty lucky!", "A little lucky", "Lucky", "Try again"])
print("Your fortune is... " + result + "!")

list.title: Number guessing game
list.code:
# A game that combines many blocks!
import random
answer = random.randint(1, 10)
print("Guess a number from 1 to 10!")

tries = 0
while True:
    guess = int(input("Enter a number: "))
    tries = tries + 1
    if guess == answer:
        print("Correct! \U0001f389 You got it in " + str(tries) + " tries!")
        break
    elif guess < answer:
        print("Go higher!")
    else:
        print("Go lower!")
